description: Zone object management — the FLAC continuum (finite-volume) grid

functions.name: containing
functions.signature: itasca.zone.containing(point: vec, search_start=None) -> Zone object or None
functions.description: Get the zone that contains point. The optional argument search_start can be given to first search the a given zone. This can speed up the check.

functions.name: count
functions.description: Get the number of zones.

functions.name: create_ratio
functions.signature: itasca.zone.create_ratio(ratio: float, index: int, isize: int) -> float
functions.description: Get a value calculated by a geometric progression, given a ratio, an index, and a size. This is the same ratio as is used in the zone create logic, the Sketch, and Building-Blocks. This divides the interval from 0.0 to 1.0 into size sections each of which is ratio times the size of the previous one. `ratio` is the geometric ratio to use for the progression. Each interval will be ratio times larger than the previous. `index` is the index (from 0 to size) of the location in the progression to calculate. `isize` is the total number of intervals involved. The return value is the fraction from 0.0 to 1.0 of the geometric progression from 0 to size at index of the given ratio.

functions.name: creep_time_total
functions.description: Get the total accumulated zone module creep time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone creep module is active.

functions.name: creep_timestep
functions.description: Get the timestep used by the zone creep module when it is active. This may not be the timestep used, as other active modules may require a smaller timestep.

functions.name: dynamic_time_total
functions.description: Get the total accumulated zone module dynamic time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone dynamic module is active.

functions.name: dynamic_timestep
functions.description: Get the total accumulated zone module creep time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone creep module is active.

functions.name: find
functions.description: Get the zone object with the given ID number.

functions.name: fluid_ratio
functions.description: Get the current fluid convergence ratio for zones. This is defined as the ratio of total unbalanced flow to the total flow through the zones.

functions.name: fluid_stress_normal
functions.description: Get the current maximum value of convergence in any gridpoint in the model. See the model.solve.convergence keyword.

functions.name: fluid_time_total
functions.description: Get the total accumulated zone module fluid time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone fluid module is active.

functions.name: fluid_timestep
functions.description: Get the current fluid timestep. Note that this may not be the timestep used in a cycle, if other modules require a smaller one. This may be overriden by automatic timestep calculations, if active. Fixing a timestep greater than the calculated critical value will produce an error.

functions.name: fluid_unbal_avg
functions.description: Get the average unbalanced fluid volume limit for the fastflow solution scheme.

functions.name: fluid_unbal_max
functions.description: Get the maximum unbalanced fluid limit for the fastflow solution scheme.

functions.name: force_update
functions.description: Flags the cycling logic so that a geometry update is performed at the start of the next cycle. Normally this update is performed at the start of cycling, and in large strain model at the geometry update interval. Changes to gridpoint mass and gravity caused by density and stiffness changes may not actually affect the calculation unless an update is performed.

functions.name: list
functions.description: Get a zone iterator object.

functions.name: maxid
functions.description: Get the maximum zone ID.

functions.name: mech_convergence
functions.description: Get the current maximum value of convergence in any gridpoint in the model. See the model.solve.convergence keyword.

functions.name: mech_ratio
functions.description: Get the current zone mechanical convergence ratio. See the zone ratio command.

functions.name: mech_ratio_avg
functions.description: Get the current zone mechanical average convergence ratio. See the zone ratio command.

functions.name: mech_ratio_local
functions.description: Get the current zone mechanical local convergence ratio. See the zone ratio command.

functions.name: mech_ratio_max
functions.description: Get the current zone mechanical local convergence ratio. See the zone ratio command.

functions.name: near
functions.description: Find the closest zone to a point.

functions.name: set_creep_time_total
functions.description: Set the total accumulated zone module creep time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone creep module is active.

functions.name: set_creep_timestep
functions.description: Set the timestep used by the zone creep module when it is active. This may not be the timestep used, as other active modules may require a smaller timestep.

functions.name: set_dynamic_time_total
functions.description: Set the total accumulated zone module dynamic time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone dynamic module is active.

functions.name: set_dynamic_timestep
functions.description: Set the total accumulated zone module creep time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone creep module is active.

functions.name: set_fluid_time_total
functions.description: Set the total accumulated zone module fluid time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone fluid module is active.

functions.name: set_fluid_timestep
functions.description: Set the current fluid timestep. Note that this may not be the timestep used in a cycle, if other modules require a smaller one. This may be overriden by automatic timestep calculations, if active. Fixing a timestep greater than the calculated critical value will produce an error.

functions.name: set_thermal_time_total
functions.description: Set the total accumulated zone module thermal time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone thermal module is active.

functions.name: set_thermal_timestep
functions.description: Set the current thermal timestep. Note that this may not be the timestep used in a cycle, if other modules require a smaller one. This may be overriden by automatic timestep calculations, if active. Fixing a timestep greater than the calculated critical value will produce an error.

functions.name: thermal_ratio
functions.description: Get the current thermal convergence ratio for zones. This is defined as the ratio of total unbalanced heat flow to the total heat flow through the zones.

functions.name: thermal_time_total
functions.description: Get the total accumulated zone module thermal time. This accumulates the timesteps of every cycle the zone thermal module is active.

functions.name: thermal_timestep
functions.description: Get the current thermal timestep. Note that this may not be the timestep used in a cycle, if other modules require a smaller one. This may be overriden by automatic timestep calculations, if active. Fixing a timestep greater than the calculated critical value will produce an error.

functions.name: unbal
functions.description: Get the current maximum unbalanced force on any gridpoint in the model.
